ack.detail: MLLP TCP listener auto-generates ACK before processing: AA on success, AE on error, AR on rejection.

field_map.source: PID-3 where assigning authority is NHS, PID-3.1
field_map.note: Double quotes removed.

field_map.source: PID-3 where assigning authority is MR, PID-3.1
field_map.note: Double quotes removed; first PID-3 repetition also supplies URL HospitalNumber.
Title case normalized; middle name appended to first name; quotes removed.
DOB yyyyMMdd converted to yyyy-MM-dd; quotes removed.
Country GB and Type HOME are constants.
Optional fields emitted only when populated; date of death converted to yyyy-MM-dd.
Defaults to V81999 and G9999981; GP is truncated to eight characters.

field_map.target: PatientAppointment Clinic mapping, URL VisitID, AppointmentDate and AppointmentTime
field_map.note: PV1-44 becomes yyyy-MM-dd and HH:mm, defaulting missing time to 00:00.
A31 becomes 1, otherwise 0.
Script attempts Scheduled/Attended/Discharged based on MSH-1, but MSH-1 is the field separator; A08 clears the mapping.
